notableEvents.label: Willson Contreras plunked
notableEvents.detail: Brewers challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was upheld: Willson Contreras hit by pitch. Roman Anthony to 3rd. Masataka Yoshida to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: William Contreras reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Caleb Durbin. Sal Frelick scores. David Hamilton to 3rd. Brice Turang to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: William Contreras reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Caleb Durbin. Sal Frelick scores. David Hamilton to 3rd. Brice Turang to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Andruw Monasterio pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andruw Monasterio flies out to right fielder Sal Frelick.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Red Sox challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Garrett Mitchell singles on a line drive to left fielder Roman Anthony. Brice Turang scores. Christian Yelich scores. Garrett Mitchell to 3rd. Throwing error by left fielder Roman Anthony.

notableEvents.detail: Red Sox challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Garrett Mitchell singles on a line drive to left fielder Roman Anthony. Brice Turang scores. Christian Yelich scores. Garrett Mitchell to 3rd. Throwing error by left fielder Roman Anthony.
